EQUIPMENT
Stunstick The stunstick looks like standard police officer's club ad was developed as nonletha weapon tor crowd control. When activated delivers powertul neural shock to unprotected ligntly covered skin; often rendering the target unconscious Resolve stunstick attack normally; but do not add the wielder' $ STR the damage result; The attack inflicts Fatigue normally: but all wound results are disregarded_ However; the attack would have caused Minor Wound worse, the target must make Knockout Check: the attack would have caused Serious Wound the Check has +2 TN Modifier; Critical Wound Moditier; Deadly Wound +6 Modifier; and Fatal Wound +10 Modifier t0 the Knockout Check TN;
Unfortunately; the Sternsnacht didn"t exist: The pistol that Burton carried was hunting rifle neavily modified to function pistol, In an attempt t0 cash in on the popularity; two com: panies including the original manufacturer of Burton' modified pistol, flooded the market with their Sternsnacht" design_ Slightly more useful than Burton' pistol, these weapons were massive and suffered from both heavy recoil and muzzle flash_ Despite this countless hordes enthusiasts purchased their hero- gun until Burton' popularity faded_ The size the Sternsnacht's bullets limits the weapon ammunition capacity t0 three shots_ and the recoil increases the weapon"$ TN modifiers for range Dy +0/+1/+2/+3 (L.e , shot at long range moditied by +61.
SLUG-THROWERS slug-tnrower term applying t0 any personal weapon that   propels bullet other projectile using some sort of chemical reaction _ explosion magnetic acceleration. Slug throwers are the most common modern weapons available Maintenance easy and inexpensive , making them attractive t0 individuals on budget.
Rifles Slug throwing rifles are the weapon of choice for the bud: get conscious Fired from the shoulder and chambering more powerful rounds rifles have greater range and accuracy than pistols_ Bolt-Actlon Rifle: Much like the revolver; the bolt-action rifle is a ancient design still favored because f its simple and rugged design. The shooter must manually work the bolt t0 eject spent cartridges and feed new rounds Characters must expend Simple Action to work the bolt after each shot: Automatic Rlfle: Somewhat less reliable than bolt-action rifle, the automatic rifle is more popular because i5 easy t0 reload and is capable of burst fire Like the auto pistol (above), the automatic rifle will jam on fumble. Federated Long Rifle: The Federated Industries Iong rifle was originally designed and manufactured for the armed forces of the Federated Suns, but has since been copied by each of the other Successor States Zeus Heavy Rifle: The Zeus was designed torstopping power. giving shorter range than many other rifles_ Still , one of the more popular designs come Federated Industries and has been widely copied_
Handguns The slug ' throwing handgun IS relatively Iight and easily con: cealed: It is the standard issue sidearm for most militaries and police agencies and it is the civilian selt defense weapon of choice Revolver: The oldest basic design still in service_ its sim- plicity and rugged design make reliable thougn has limit- ed ammunition capacity: Auto- F Pistol: The auto-loading pistol (often referred to as a automatic  feeds ammunilion Iromn detachable magazine, allowing higher capacity and quicker reload time than basic revolver, These weapons are prone jams; any fumbled Action Check using auto-pistol results jam. Clearing the jam requires Complex Action; Hold-Out Pistol: The smallest and lightest style firearm in use today; the hold out pistol easily concealed and often womn as back-up weapon: nas limited dMmo capacity: short range and weak stopping power: Mydron: Somewhat larger than standard auto-pistol, the Kydron distinguishes itself by firing bursts of up t0 five rounds time lacks the stability of rifle or submachine gun_ suffers from significant recoil when fired burst mode Like auto-pistol (above). the Mydron will jam tumble Characters use SMG Skill when wielding this gun Sternsnacht: Something of a oddity in the annals of mod ern weaponry. the Sternsnacht became popular in the 2880s _ when Solaris VII legend Tag Burton wore this monstrosity during his duels. On more than one instance in what were  surely staged scenes, he popped his cockpit hatch and delivered the klling blow to an opponent's 'Mech with his "Sternsnacht hand cannon As the vids of his matches circulated around the Inner Sphere , people wanted t0 emulate their hero' and demand for bis weapon soared
Submachine Guns Smaller than rifle and capable holding more rounds the SMG easily concealable is capable of single-shot and burst fire  though less accurate firing the latter. An SMG subject t0 jamming on fumbles the same way as tne auto-pis (above). SMG: The standard" SMG closely resembles large tol with an elongated magazine extending from its grip_ Rorynex RM-3/XXI SMG: Using slightly smaller bullet to increase its overall range_ Rorynex Industries- popular XXI is potent weapon_ Its high capacity magazine allows full-auto fire while explosive tipped bullets can shred most personal armors_ These qualities also make the Rorynex illegal on hun dreds of worlds across the Inner Sphere. Imperator 289441 SMG: In contrast t0 Rorynex Industries" approacn Dr. Uziel Gal chose t0 use much larger round in his 289441 Combined with longer barrel, the Imperator is an extremely accurate and deadly weapon_
